summary: Testing of Merchant Delete and Admin Features completed successfully. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified working.

issues: HTML hydration warning: <tr> and <span> as children of <tbody> - React console warning but does not affect functionality

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_merchant_delete_admin_features.py - New test file for merchant delete and admin features
seed_data_creation: Used existing merchants for testing. Merchants 'Test Restaurant' and 'Push Test Merchant' already marked as deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features working correctly. Merchant delete action works via POST /api/sdm/admin/merchants/{id}/control with action='delete'. Deleted/blocked/suspended merchants filtered from public partners list. Admin Management panel shows 'Create Admin' button for super admins.

backend_apis: POST /api/sdm/admin/merchants/{id}/control (action='delete') - PASS (Super Admin only, returns 403 for normal admin)
GET /api/admin/profile - PASS (returns admin role and permissions)

Merchant Modal - 'Supprimer le Marchand' button visible with '(Réservé aux Super Admins)' note
Admin & Security Panel - 'Create Admin' button visible for Super Admin
Create New Admin Modal - All fields present (Username, Email, Password, Role)
Merchant table shows proper Status badges (Active, Deleted, Blocked, Cash Off)
